## PR description

**Preferred:** Copy the body from `ai/changes/<branch-slug>.md` (see `ai/Branch-Changes.md`). Use the same filename rule as the guide: replace `/` in your branch name with `-`, e.g. `feature/foo-bar` → `ai/changes/feature-foo-bar.md`.

If you have not created that file yet, use the template in `ai/Branch-Changes.md` and paste the filled sections below.
